task_completion.description: The real estate listing document is opened in Microsoft Word.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Microsoft Word is open and displaying a document containing real estate images.

task_completion.description: The first image (Exterior) is cropped to remove the left ~20%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The crop tool is active on the left edge of the first image, or the first image visibly lacks its left portion (driveway edge) compared to a standard uncropped photo.

task_completion.description: The 'Simple Frame, White' picture style is applied to the images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The images in the document have a distinct white border frame around them, or the 'Simple Frame, White' option is selected in the Picture Format ribbon.

task_completion.description: Pictures are compressed to E-mail (96 ppi) with cropped areas deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Compress Pictures' dialog box is visible with 'E-mail (96 ppi)' selected and the 'Delete cropped areas of pictures' checkbox ticked.
The Microsoft Word title bar displays 'Property_Listing_Email.docx', or a 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved with this name in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the Microsoft Word GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Word ribbon, dialog boxes, and image handles rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent manually applied the crop, style, and compression settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible use of the Picture Format tab, Crop tool, and Compress Pictures dialog, rather than just downloading or moving a pre-made file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use command-line tools to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No PowerShell, Command Prompt, or Python scripts are used to manipulate the docx XML or rename the file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected filename: 'Property_Listing_Email.docx'. The final file must be saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents' and be under 3MB (3145728 bytes). The document must contain exactly 3 images. The first image must be cropped by ~20% on the left side. All images must have the 'Simple Frame, White' style applied, which appears as a white border frame. The 'Compress Pictures' feature must be used with 'E-mail (96 ppi)' resolution and 'Delete cropped areas of pictures' checked.
